result.status_detail: RETRY after user setting change — character.ai still NOT intercepted by APF v2.2.4 d29d868. PII prompt with RRN was sent through to character.ai chat (William Afton), no '차단' warning, no APF DOM marker, no engine intercept. AI bubble stuck on typing-dots ('...') for 60s+ — service-side slowness, not a block.
result.ai_response_body_text_tail: He sees you outside Freddy Fazbear's by yourself. He didn't really mind since you were just on your phone and not really do anything. You were here for your little brothers birthday party but there wasn't much to do, at least not for an 18yro.  [+ user prompt with 901010-1234567 echoed in chat] [+ second AI bubble showing only typing-dots '...' (no text rendered after 60s)]

notes: RETRY of #866 (character APF v2.2.4 d29d868 verify) after user adjusted setting on test PC. Test flow: opened https://character.ai/ via Ctrl+L navigation (hard reload Ctrl+Shift+R applied to prior Alastor tab), selected first character card William Afton (created fresh chat /chat/zfu6DTRY...), DevTools Console open BEFORE submit. Submitted PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?' via Type tool with press_enter, waited 45s + 15s additional. Result identical to prior #866 attempt: NO APF intercept (engine NOT firing on character.ai WS endpoint), NO '차단' text in DOM, NO [data-apf]/[id*=apf]/[class*=apf] marker. RRN echoed in user-bubble proves prompt was rendered to UI without filtering. The 2nd AI bubble was stuck on typing-dots placeholder (UI element shown is the loading-dots SVG, no AI text rendered) for 60s — likely character.ai backend slowness, NOT an APF block (an APF block would replace bubble with '차단' text or inject warning, not leave a loading spinner). User's setting change between #866 attempt 1 and this RETRY did not enable interception. Conclusion: APF v2.2.4 d29d868 still missing character.ai URL/host pattern in WS capture. Verdict=FAIL.
